title: cyclophorus rasamalae
intro: Cyclophorus rasamalae is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the corkscrew rush due to its unique twisted stems. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Cyclophorus rasamalae can be prepared into herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and poultices for topical application.
